name: io.dual.autochain_claim.demo.v1
description: AutoChain demo template for OEM warranty claim validation across a dealer network.

oem.description: OEM or tier-1 supplier responsible for signature verification.

approved_amount_usd.description: Computed reimbursable amount after policy checks.

serial_status.description: matched, tampered, duplicate, recalled, or unknown.

oem_signature_valid.description: Whether the serial signature validates against the OEM registry.

dealer_authorized.description: Whether the dealer is currently authorized for this OEM network.

coverage_active.description: Whether warranty date and mileage terms are in force.

duplicate_claim.description: Whether the part/VIN pair was previously reimbursed.

policy_hash.description: Hash of active warranty validation policy.

serial_hash.description: Hash of VIN, part serial, OEM, and part category.

decision_hash.description: Hash of the latest evaluator decision.

updated_at.description: ISO timestamp for the latest local or DUAL-backed update.
